specs.title: cp-000: Successful import uses alert to show importedskippedfailed counts
cp-001: Successful import refreshes subscriptions through useFeedStoregetStateloadSubscr
cp-002: Failed import uses alertdataerror Import failed
cp-003: Import handler clears the file input value after handling the selected file
cp-004: Mark all read in the header always calls markAllRead for the current store state
cp-005: Sort segmented control contains exactly Newest Oldest and Relevance
cp-006: Clicking Newest sets sortBy newest and sortDir desc
cp-007: Clicking Oldest sets sortBy oldest and sortDir asc
cp-008: Clicking Relevance sets sortBy relevance while preserving the current sortDir
cp-009: Layout control buttons expose visible tooltipstitles List Card and Magazine
cp-010: Layout control is icon-only the labels are not rendered inline in the header
cp-011: Add Feed button sets showAddModal true
cp-012: Error banner shows the store error string and a Dismiss text button
cp-013: Dismissing the error banner calls clearError and removes the banner
cp-014: Feed sidebar is hidden below the lg breakpoint
cp-015: Reading pane copilot column is hidden below the xl breakpoint
cp-016: Reading pane copilot column is not shown at all until an article is selected
cp-017: Feed sidebar All Articles Unread and Starred buttons clear both selectedFeedId a
cp-018: All Articles is treated as selected only when both selectedFeedId and selectedFo
cp-019: Folder buttons set selectedFolder and clear selectedFeedId
cp-020: Feed-item buttons set selectedFeedId and do not automatically change viewFilter
cp-021: Sidebar groups subscriptions by exact subfolder string empty folder values fall
cp-022: Folder unread totals are recalculated by summing subunreadCount across that fold
cp-023: Feed-item favicon falls back to getFaviconUrlsiteUrl feedUrl when no explicit fa
cp-024: Broken favicon images are hidden by setting display none on error
cp-025: Muted feeds render at reduced opacity via opacity-50
cp-026: Muteunmute control is visually hidden until the row is hovered
cp-027: Muteunmute clicks stop propagation and do not select the feed row
cp-028: Muteunmute flow is not optimistic in the store it PATCHes apifeedsid then reload
cp-029: Pending mute state disables only the currently mutating mute button
cp-030: Selecting a feed folder or view filter resets article pagination to page 0 and t
cp-031: ArticleList loads available journals once on mount through loadJournals
cp-032: Article skeleton state shows exactly 5 SkeletonCards when the first page is load
cp-033: Empty article state renders No articles only when loading is false and the artic
cp-034: Load more button is shown only when hasMore is true
